items.name: Abyssal Wyvern Helmet
items.description:
Dominate the darkness with the Abyssal Wyvern Helmet! 🐲⚙️ This accessory features a fierce metallic blue-and-steel design with glowing accents and sharp dragon-like scales. It’s the perfect statement piece for any sci-fi, mecha, or monster-themed outfit, designed for those who want to show fearless strength and advanced style.

📣 JOIN OUR COMMUNITY AND SUPPORT! 📣
If you love this style, join my groups to see more exclusive accessories, clothing, and participate in special events. Your support helps me keep creating!

👉 Accessories group: https://www.roblox.com/communities/789954184/Norange-Custom-UGC#!/store

👉 Clothing group: https://www.roblox.com/communities/370739840/Norange5555-Clothing#!/about

items.name: Nuclear Winter Masked Man Helmet
items.description: Forged in the fire of pre-war industries, this bulky helmet once shielded mech operators from both shrapnel and the piercing glare of nuclear dawn. Its dome-like LED visor gleams faintly, a ghostly eye watching over the desolation. The faded skull paint, worn by time and sorrow, hints at a legacy of forgotten warriors, their burden carried forward by those who dare to tread the wasteland
